'''doshapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fab|fab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fab|fab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doshapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshapithi|doshapithi]] || [[word:doshapiji|doshapiji]] || [[word:doshapishi|doshapishi]] || [[word:doshapiki|doshapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshaputhuthu|doshaputhuthu]] || [[word:doshapujuju|doshapujuju]] || [[word:doshapushushu|doshapushushu]] || [[word:doshapukuku|doshapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshaputhu|doshaputhu]] || [[word:doshapuju|doshapuju]] || [[word:doshapushu|doshapushu]] || [[word:doshapuku|doshapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshapufthuf|doshapufthuf]] || [[word:doshapufjuf|doshapufjuf]] || [[word:doshapufshuf|doshapufshuf]] || [[word:doshapufkuf|doshapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshapethe|doshapethe]] || [[word:doshapeje|doshapeje]] || [[word:doshapeshe|doshapeshe]] || [[word:doshapeke|doshapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshapothotho|doshapothotho]] || [[word:doshapojojo|doshapojojo]] || [[word:doshaposhosho|doshaposhosho]] || [[word:doshapokoko|doshapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshapotho|doshapotho]] || [[word:doshapojo|doshapojo]] || [[word:doshaposho|doshaposho]] || [[word:doshapoko|doshapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshapofthof|doshapofthof]] || [[word:doshapofjof|doshapofjof]] || [[word:doshapofshof|doshapofshof]] || [[word:doshapofkof|doshapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshapïfthïf|doshapïfthïf]] || [[word:doshapïfjïf|doshapïfjïf]] || [[word:doshapïfshïf|doshapïfshïf]] || [[word:doshapïfkïf|doshapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshapïfthïfthïf|doshapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:doshapïfjïfjïf|doshapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:doshapïfshïfshïf|doshapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:doshapïfkïfkïf|doshapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshapïfthïf|doshapïfthïf]] || [[word:doshapïfjïf|doshapïfjïf]] || [[word:doshapïfshïf|doshapïfshïf]] || [[word:doshapïfkïf|doshapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshapïfthïf|doshapïfthïf]] || [[word:doshapïfjïf|doshapïfjïf]] || [[word:doshapïfshïf|doshapïfshïf]] || [[word:doshapïfkïf|doshapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:doshapæthæ|doshapæthæ]] || [[word:doshapæjæ|doshapæjæ]] || [[word:doshapæshæ|doshapæshæ]] || [[word:doshapækæ|doshapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:doshapathatha|doshapathatha]] || [[word:doshapajaja|doshapajaja]] || [[word:doshapashasha|doshapashasha]] || [[word:doshapakaka|doshapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:doshapatha|doshapatha]] || [[word:doshapaja|doshapaja]] || [[word:doshapasha|doshapasha]] || [[word:doshapaka|doshapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:doshapafthaf|doshapafthaf]] || [[word:doshapafjaf|doshapafjaf]] || [[word:doshapafshaf|doshapafshaf]] || [[word:doshapafkaf|doshapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:doshapasha|doshapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshapshësha|doshapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshaprosha|doshaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshapmusha|doshapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshapyasha|doshapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshapnkshësha|godoshapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshapnkrosha|godoshapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshapnkmusha|godoshapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshapnkyasha|godoshapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:doshashapasha|doshashapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshashapshësha|doshashapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshashaprosha|doshashaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshashapmusha|doshashapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshashapyasha|doshashapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshashapnkshësha|godoshashapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshashapnkrosha|godoshashapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshashapnkmusha|godoshashapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshashapnkyasha|godoshashapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:deshæpasha|deshæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:deshæpshësha|deshæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:deshæprosha|deshæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:deshæpmusha|deshæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:deshæpyasha|deshæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godeshæpnkshësha|godeshæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godeshæpnkrosha|godeshæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godeshæpnkmusha|godeshæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godeshæpnkyasha|godeshæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:doshfapasha|doshfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doshfapshësha|doshfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doshfaprosha|doshfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doshfapmusha|doshfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doshfapyasha|doshfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoshfapnkshësha|godoshfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoshfapnkrosha|godoshfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoshfapnkmusha|godoshfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoshfapnkyasha|godoshfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
